CATaN 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • CATaN: Canonical correlation Analysis of Transcriptome and TF-gene regulatory Networks
  • Changelog

Reference

All functions

tfsampleLoading() trasampleLoading() ccParameters() snpScores() topSnps() bottomSnps()

Accessor generics for CATaN classes

show(<CATaNAnnotation>)

CATaNAnnotation class

show(<CATaNResult>)

CATaNResult class

align_cc_to_snps()

Align CC scores to SNP positions

bim_to_granges()

Read a PLINK .bim file as GRanges

catan_data_status()

List available CATaN reference data

download_peak_beds()

Download TF peak BED files from Zenodo

download_tf_matrix()

Download TF-gene binding matrix from Zenodo

export_for_sldsc()

Export CC annotations as S-LDSC-ready BED files

extract_top_bottom_snps()

Extract top and bottom percentile SNPs by CC score

filter_low_expression()

Filter low-expression genes from a count matrix

plotCC()

Plot CC scatter plots from CATaNResult

prepare_matrices()

Prepare TF and transcriptome matrices for CCA

run_catan()

Run the full CATaN pipeline

run_cca()

Run Canonical Correlation Analysis of TF-GRN matrix and transcriptome data
